entries.description: Project scaffold — NestJS 11, Prisma 6, modular monolith architecture with 13 domain modules
Identity Module — register, login, JWT access+refresh tokens, OTP (in-memory), email verification
Users/Profile Module — profile CRUD, tenant memberships, consent management with scopes & versioning
Tenant Module — CRUD, slug uniqueness, publish workflow with auto-default theme, ownership verification
Builder Module — Page→Section→Component hierarchy, navigation & theme management per tenant
Renderer Module — SDUI app definition endpoint generating {theme, navigation, screens} JSON contract
Commerce Module — products, categories, pagination, soft-delete, case-insensitive search, product images
Templates Module — 3 seed templates (Store, Restaurant, Clinic), non-destructive template application
Media Module — local file upload with UUID naming, static asset serving, tenant-scoped media listing
QR Module — QR metadata generation with deep-link format, slug→tenant resolution
Discovery Module — featured tenants, case-insensitive search, 12 hardcoded vertical categories, stub nearby
Admin Module — approve/suspend tenants, platform stats, stub admin verification
Notifications Module — DB-persisted notification records, sendPush helper, mark-as-read endpoint
Global response envelope ({success, message, data}), exception filter, validation pipe, throttler guard, Swagger docs
PLAN.md — comprehensive master implementation plan covering all 12 PRD specifications
Event Bus — in-process pub/sub with sync/async dispatch, DomainEvent interface, typed event classes
Tenant Context — AsyncLocalStorage-based context propagation, tenant resolver middleware (header/slug/domain)
Redis Module — ioredis wrapper with in-memory mock fallback, OTP store, cache, pub/sub
Background Job Queue — Bull/BullMQ with 5 queues (publishing, notifications, assets, webhooks, analytics)
Structured Logging — nestjs-pino with pino-pretty, LoggerService with correlationId/tenantId/userId context
Correlation ID Middleware — generates/carries x-correlation-id across all requests
Health Check — /health endpoint with DB connectivity check, uptime, status reporting
Full RBAC System — Role, Permission, RolePermission, UserRole models; RequireRole/RequirePermission decorators; RbacGuard

Prisma Schema — added 30+ models for IAM (Device, PasswordHistory), Tenant (Config, Plan, Subscription, Domain), Publishing (Draft, Release, Validation), Assets (Folder, Version), Commerce (Cart, Order, Coupon, Fulfillment, Tax, Variant), Booking (Service, Staff, Resource, Schedule, WaitingList), Forms (Field, Submission, Approval, Workflow), Payments (Provider, Account, Intent, Transaction, Webhook, FinancialEvent), Notifications (Template, Event, Preference, DeviceToken, DeliveryResult)
Seed — roles (super_admin, support, operations, finance), 20 permissions, 3 subscription plans (Starter/Business/Enterprise), 3 payment providers (Flutterwave, Paystack, Stripe)
IAM Platform — device management (register/list/update/revoke), password validation (strength/history/recording), account recovery (forgot/reset with Redis-backed tokens)
Auth service — OTP migrated from in-memory Map to Redis, registration uses PasswordService for validation + history
Tenant Platform — runtime configuration (languages/currency/timezone/offlinePolicy), subscription management (subscribe/cancel/status), feature flag resolution from plan
API Gateway — GatewayRateLimiter with Redis-backed sliding window, BFF module with 4 client-specific backends
Mobile BFF — manifest delivery with Redis caching, discovery feed, aggregated user profile, notifications with unread count, tenant catalog
Tenant Dashboard BFF — dashboard summary (pages/products/orders/bookings counts), 30-day analytics, integration status
Business Dashboard BFF — platform overview stats, paginated tenant list with subscription info, recent audit logs
Website BFF — public categories, featured tenants for landing page, pricing plans from subscription DB

Publishing Pipeline — validation engine (pages/home/slugs/sections checks), manifest compiler (SDUI JSON with theme/navigation/features/screens), release management (publish/rollback/history), draft tracking, Redis cache invalidation, ReleasePublished/RollbackCompleted events

DAM Platform — ImageOptimizer (Sharp-based pipeline: webp conversion, 5 preset variants {thumbnail/small/medium/large/og-image}, responsive sizing), enhanced MediaService (upload with auto-optimization, variant generation, CDN URL resolver, folder CRUD, version tracking via AssetVersion, hash-based dedup), enhanced controller with folder endpoints

Commerce Platform — cart engine (getOrCreate/add/update/remove/applyCoupon/recalculate), checkout flow (cart→order conversion, coupon usage increment), order lifecycle (create/status transition validation/paid/fulfilled timestamps, OrderCreated/OrderStatusChanged events), coupons CRUD with usage tracking, fulfillments CRUD with completion timestamp, tax rules CRUD with default-handling + calculation endpoint, product variants CRUD, enhanced product listing with price/sort filters

Booking & Scheduling — service CRUD, staff CRUD with service assignments, resource CRUD, schedule management (recurring weekly + date-specific), availability engine (slot generation from schedules, conflict detection with existing bookings, capacity check), booking workflow (create/7-state status transitions with validation, BookingCreated/BookingStatusChanged events), waiting list (add/list/notify), calendar endpoint

Forms & Workflow — form CRUD with fields/sections/config, server-side validation engine (required/minLength/maxLength/min/max/pattern/email type checks), submission handling (version tracking, FormSubmitted event), approval workflow engine (upsert workflow steps, approve/reject with step counting, auto-status transition to approved/rejected), SubmissionApproved event

Payments Platform — PaymentAdapter interface with PaystackAdapter + FlutterwaveAdapter (initialize/verify/webhook), PaymentsService (initialize intent with tenant account lookup, verify with provider, webhook processing with logging and intent status update, PaymentCompleted event), PaymentsController (initialize/verify/list/webhook endpoints)

Notification Platform — in-app notifications (list/markRead/markAllRead/unread count), dispatch engine (sendPush with FCM token delivery, sendEmail stub, sendFromTemplate with variable injection), template CRUD with version tracking, preference management per user/channel/category with quiet hours, device token registration/unregistration, delivery result tracking

Documentation overhaul — README.md rewritten with full Phase 0-2 platform architecture, complete API reference tables (~120 endpoints), current project structure, seed data, and status; IMPLEMENTATION.md updated with all 14+ modules, Phase 0 infrastructure docs, entity relationship diagram, environment variables; PLAN.md archived as PLAN_ARCHIVED.md (superseded)

Google & Apple Sign-In — googleId/appleId fields on User (unique, nullable), passwordHash made optional for social-only users, Google OAuth strategy + google-auth-library ID token verification, Apple Sign-In strategy + apple-signin-auth identity token verification, /auth/google and /auth/apple POST endpoints with account linking (finds by googleId/appleId or email, creates if new), updated env vars
Theme Module — full CRUD with versioning (ThemeVersion model), ThemeCompiler for SDUI token bundles (light/dark mode), restore/reset to defaults, Redis caching, ThemeUpdated/Created/Restored events

Builder Enhancement — ComponentRegistryService (12 component types with prop schemas), ActionBuilderService (10 action types: navigate/open_url/api_call/call_phone/email/share/add_to_cart/book_service/open_form/scroll_to), ConditionalEngineService (AND/OR groups, 10 operators), DataBindingService (static/context/api/query sources), LivePreviewService (full tenant/page/component preview with context overrides)

Commerce Enhancement — unified catalog (physical/service/digital/donation/membership/event_ticket product types), multi-currency extended pricing, InventoryReservation model + reserve/release/confirm/adjust-stock workflow, stock-aware cart add

Booking Enhancement — BookingLocation model (CRUD), CancellationPolicy model with refund tier calculation, BookingReminder model + schedule/process reminders engine, cancellation-aware status transitions with cancelledAt/cancelReason timestamps, waiting list auto-notify on cancel

Notifications Enhancement — SmsAdapter (Twilio/Termii/AfricaTalking/log), campaign support (bulk push/email/SMS to multiple users), click tracking endpoint, enhanced dispatch engine with channel-aware template routing

Payments Enhancement — refundPayment + healthCheck on PaymentAdapter interface implemented for Paystack and Flutterwave, processRefund (partial/full) with financial event recording, Settlement model + record/confirm settlements, provider health check endpoint (per-provider and all), transaction listing with type/status filters

Phase 3b.7 Integration Platform — IntegrationConnector/OAuthToken/WebhookOutbox/SyncJob models, IntegrationsService (connect/disconnect/test/sync/queueWebhook/processPendingWebhooks), IntegrationsController, retry with exponential backoff

Phase 3b.8 Analytics & BI — AnalyticsEvent/Dashboard/DashboardWidget/SavedReport models, AnalyticsService (trackEvent/getEvents/getEventAggregation/getRevenueReport/getUserAnalytics/getBookingAnalytics/getDashboardSummary), DashboardsService, ReportsService, full CRUD endpoints
Phase 3b.9 Search & Discovery — SearchIndex/SearchQuery/SearchSynonym models, SearchService (index/remove/bulkIndex/search/autocomplete/getFacets/popularSearches/noResultQueries/synonyms CRUD)

Phase 3b.10 AI Platform — AIProvider/AIPrompt/AICompletion/AIEmbedding models, OpenAIProvider (completions + embeddings with cost calc), MockAIProvider fallback, AiService (complete/embed/prompt CRUD/render/usageStats)

Phase 3b.11 Platform Administration — PlatformSetting/SystemAnnouncement/FeatureFlag/ApiQuota models, PlatformAdminService (settings/announcements/featureFlags/plans/subscriptions/quotas/platformStats CRUD)
Phase 3c.12 Infrastructure & DevOps — Deployment/Environment/HealthCheck/Backup models, InfrastructureService (deployments/environments/healthChecks/backups/cache/infraOverview)

Phase 3c.13 Security & Compliance — SecurityPolicy/ApiKey/SecurityEvent/ConsentAudit models, SecurityService (policy CRUD/password validation/API key management with SHA-256 hashing/security events/consent audits)

Phase 3c.14 Developer Platform — DeveloperApp/WebhookEndpoint/WebhookEventLog models, DeveloperService (app CRUD/client secret regeneration/webhook CRUD/event delivery with timeout/retries/webhook logs/rate limit status)
Phase 4.15 Marketplace & Plugin System — MarketplaceListing/PluginInstallation models, MarketplaceService (listing CRUD/install/uninstall/toggle/config/pluginStats)

Phase 4.16 Asset Platform Enhanced — AssetCollection/AssetCollectionItem/AssetShare/StorageProvider models, AssetsEnhancedService (collection CRUD/addRemoveMedia/share token CRUD/resolve with download tracking/storage provider CRUD/stats/transformation presets)

Gap fixes — EmailAdapter (SendGrid/Resend/SES/SMTP/log), PushAdapter (Expo/FCM/APNS/log), StripeAdapter (Checkout Sessions/refunds/health), Anthropic AI provider, SendGrid & Google Calendar integration connectors, campaign segmentation engine, click tracking analytics, docs update with all Phase 3-4 modules
